news.t: ETF issuers defied investor expectations by raising fees in 2023. They may have to keep doing it.

holdings.infoBox: NUGO is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 14.13%, Apple at 12.33%, Alphabet at 9.46%, Microsoft at 7.93%, and Broadcom at 6.86%.

overview.description: The Nuveen Growth Opportunities ETF (NUGO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that primarily invests in US large-cap stocks selected for growth, quality, and value factors. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation. NUGO was launched on Sep 27, 2021 and is issued by Nuveen.

data.title: ETF issuers defied investor expectations by raising fees in 2023. They may have to keep doing it.
data.text: Hello! This is MarketWatch reporter Isabel Wang bringing you this week's ETF Wrap. After a decade of seemingly never-ending fee-cutting wars, ETF issuers raised their fees in 2023 as the landscape evo...
